name: python3-jaraco.functools
title: python3-jaraco.functools
summary: additional functools in the spirit of stdlib's functools
description:
additional functools in the spirit of stdlib's functools
Jaraco.functools provides additional functools in the spirit of stdlib's
functools, mostly needed as a dependency of other projects by the same
upstream developer such as the 'tempora' module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jaraco.functools because additional functools in the spirit of stdlib's functools.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jaraco.functools as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jaraco.functools with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jaraco.functools --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
